goal: Найти один или несколько ортогональных specialist-сигналов или conditioning-слоёв, которые работают там, где база active-signal-v1@1 не торгует, и доказанно приносят новые входы, а не скрытый дубляж.
global_constraints: База active-signal-v1@1 immutable — не ретюнить, не менять пороги, часы, дни, исполнение.
Сырые event-entry конструкции (один event + один фильтр) запрещены — H1/H2 тупик.
Каждый кандидат сначала проходит complement-first режим: вход только на base_absent anchor-барах.
Single-filter entry запрещён — минимум три логических слоя (новый слой + подтверждение режима + ограничитель плотности).
Model-first запрещён до завершения Wave A (low-friction).
Кандидат отклоняется, если strict additive слабый, а permissive сильный — признак скрытого каннибализма.

slices.title: Complement-first standalone backtests
slices.hypothesis: Run standalone backtests in complement-only mode first to verify each prototype has independent value on the space where the base does not trade.
slices.objective: Run standalone backtests in complement-only mode first to verify each prototype has independent value on the space where the base does not trade.
success_criteria: Shortlist of prototypes that look like real specialist candidates even on complement-only mode.
evidence_requirements: Shortlist of prototypes that look like real specialist candidates even on complement-only mode.

slices.title: Stability, concentration и specialist verification
slices.hypothesis: Retain only prototypes that work as genuine specialist layers across windows, not those living on a single lucky historical slice.
slices.objective: Retain only prototypes that work as genuine specialist layers across windows, not those living on a single lucky historical slice.
success_criteria: Only stable specialists or honestly limited but reproducible regime-repair layers remain.
evidence_requirements: Only stable specialists or honestly limited but reproducible regime-repair layers remain.

slices.title: Интеграция с базой в двух режимах
slices.hypothesis: Test each finalist in both strict additive and permissive integration modes against the unchanged base to determine genuine additivity vs hidden overlap.
slices.objective: Test each finalist in both strict additive and permissive integration modes against the unchanged base to determine genuine additivity vs hidden overlap.
success_criteria: Clear picture of who is genuinely additive vs who looks good only by mixing with the base.
evidence_requirements: Clear picture of who is genuinely additive vs who looks good only by mixing with the base.
